zodiac_signs.Aries: March 21 - April 19 | Element: Fire | Traits: Bold, Energetic, Courageous

zodiac_signs.Gemini: May 21 - June 20 | Element: Air | Traits: Curious, Adaptable, Expressive
zodiac_signs.Cancer: June 21 - July 22 | Element: Water | Traits: Nurturing, Sensitive, Protective

zodiac_signs.Virgo: August 23 - September 22 | Element: Earth | Traits: Practical, Detail-Oriented, Caring
zodiac_signs.Libra: September 23 - October 22 | Element: Air | Traits: Balanced, Charming, Diplomatic
zodiac_signs.Scorpio: October 23 - November 21 | Element: Water | Traits: Intense, Passionate, Determined
zodiac_signs.Sagittarius: November 22 - December 21 | Element: Fire | Traits: Adventurous, Optimistic, Honest
zodiac_signs.Capricorn: December 22 - January 19 | Element: Earth | Traits: Disciplined, Ambitious, Responsible

planets.Sun: Represents your core self, ego, and vitality.
planets.Moon: Represents emotions, instincts, and inner world.
planets.Mercury: Represents communication, intellect, and thought process.
planets.Venus: Represents love, beauty, attraction, and harmony.
planets.Mars: Represents energy, action, drive, and passion.
planets.Jupiter: Represents growth, expansion, luck, and optimism.
planets.Uranus: Represents innovation, rebellion, and sudden change.
